summary: Vijay Online Centre Android app with OTP customer login, admin login, service list, form submission (name, mobile, address, document upload), and real-time database. Focus on fixing authentication: persistent login sessions, working logout button, and removing unauthorized submission errors.
architectural_notes: App uses OTP-based customer login and separate admin login
Real-time database connection required before form submission
User ID must be automatically attached to every form submission
known_issues: Logout button not functioning — user not redirected to login page on logout
Unauthorized error on form submission despite user being logged in
Session not persisted after login — user must re-login each time

existing_features.title: Implement persistent customer session in AuthContext so that once a customer logs in, their session is restored automatically on every page load (using localStorage) and they are NOT redirected to the login screen unless they explicitly log out.

Fix the Logout button in the Layout component so that clicking it clears the customer or admin session from both AuthContext state and localStorage, then navigates the user back to the login/selection screen.

Fix the 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can submit orders' error in ServiceForm and any other form submission flows. Ensure that after a customer logs in, the authenticated user's principal or customer ID is correctly attached to every backend call (submitOrder and any similar mutations in useQueries.ts), so forms like 'Niwas Praman Patra' submit successfully without an unauthorized error.

new_feature_requests.summary: Persistent login session - stay logged in until manual logout
Fix logout button to properly log out user and redirect to login page
Fix unauthorized error so authenticated users can submit forms without interruption
